holdings.infoBox: FDIG is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund stock at 14.78%, IREN Limited at 6.22%, Hut 8 at 5.20%, Applied Digital at 4.89%, and TeraWulf at 4.64%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Crypto Industry and Digital Payments ETF (FDIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of global companies related to cryptocurrency, blockchain technology, and digital payments processing, selected based on revenue derived from the relevant themes, and weighted by average daily trading volume. FDIG was launched on Apr 19, 2022 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Regulatory Tailwinds May Strengthen the Case for Crypto ETFs
data.text: As opposed to investing in cryptocurrencies directly, investors can opt for exposure to the entire digital currency ecosystem with the Fidelity Crypto Industry and Digital Payments ETF (FDIG).

data.text: Hello! This week's ETF Wrap looks at top performers in the first half of 2023, as well as flows, as stocks rally and crypto-related funds jump so far this year.
